issues.detail: Instructions lack coverage of error handling and edge cases.

scenarios.name: Add a shared canvas of shapes where two users can drag rectangles simultaneously without conflicts
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses `LiveList<LiveObject<Shape>>` with `useStorage`/`useMutation` and per-field `shape.set('x', x)` granular updates so only changed fields sync; baseline reaches for raw WebSockets or Yjs and misses Liveblocks' Storage primitives.

scenarios.name: Secure a Next.js Liveblocks app so users can only join rooms they have access to
scenarios.rationale: Treatment implements `/api/liveblocks-auth` with `@liveblocks/node`'s `liveblocks.prepareSession(userId, { userInfo })`, calls `liveblocksSession.allow(room, FULL_ACCESS)` after access check, and returns the `authorize()` body; baseline writes generic JWT auth and never uses the Liveblocks node SDK.
